title: hierochloe redolens var. altissima
intro: Hierochloe redolens var. altissima, also known as sweet grass or holy grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Hierochloe redolens var. altissima include relieving digestive issues, reducing anxiety and stress, and promoting a good night's sleep. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to promote overall well-being and relaxation.
